acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Unsafe FFI, if needed, is isolated to an encode-nv-sys boundary.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: No direct FFI was introduced. crates/encode-nv-sys/src/lib.rs is the system process boundary and uses #![forbid(unsafe_code)]; unsafe-boundary-scan.log found no extern C or unsafe use.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Safe encode API exposes only product-level settings.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: crates/encode/src/lib.rs exposes DesktopAv1EncodeSettings::balanced_realtime and CapturedSampleFrame, while raw ffmpeg/NVENC flags remain in madobe-encode-nv-sys.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A captured sample is encoded to an artifact.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: captured-sample.png was captured from madobe-qd-m2-nvenc-encode-sample, converted to captured-sample.rgb, and encoded to sample-av1.ivf.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Driver, GPU, encoder settings, and command logs are recorded.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: nvidia-smi.txt records RTX 4090 and driver 595.80; ffmpeg-av1-nvenc-help.txt and validation-summary.json record settings; commands.log records the command sequence.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Audit focus includes unsafe boundary and artifact validity.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validation-summary.json records directFfiIntroduced=false and artifact validity; ffprobe-sample-av1.txt and sample-av1-header.txt validate AV1/IVF.

realWorldValidation.evidence: sample-av1.ivf was produced by av1_nvenc on the reference Linux host and validated with ffprobe.

resolvedFindings.finding: Initial ffmpeg RGB input auto-converted to YUV444P, which this av1_nvenc path rejected.
resolvedFindings.resolution: The encode boundary now inserts -vf format=nv12 before av1_nvenc; the successful retry is recorded in encode-av1-nvenc.err.

residualRisks: This node validates a one-frame process-boundary sample, not direct DMA-BUF import into NVENC.
The current safe API builds an auditable ffmpeg command; execution orchestration is intentionally outside the library surface.
